h1.speaker: dot
h1.line: You held the page. Archie held the page once too. I'll tell you about it when you're back.

c1.speaker: dot
c1.line: Gibbons. Last pressure test of the week. You know where the story ends. Sell me the way you're going to end it.

c2.speaker: gary
c2.line: Not with the constable. With a conversation. Truth first — compassion in the same breath.

c3.speaker: narrator
c3.line: Dot looks at him for a long moment over the reading glasses. The red pen stays down.

c4.speaker: dot
c4.line: Archie would run it exactly the way you're about to.
